title: A surprise email
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Yesterday, I received an email from a friend who moved abroad two years ago. We had not written to each other (27) several months, so I was very surprised to hear from him. He told me that he was enjoying his new school, although he still missed some things about home. He asked (28) I was still playing basketball, because we used to be in the same team. I replied immediately and told him about my classes, my friends and the sports competition we had won recently. He said life in another country was not always easy, but it had helped him become more independent (29) before. At the end of the email, he invited me to visit him (30) the summer holidays. I would love to go, but I need to talk it (31) at home first. It was wonderful to be back in touch (32) an old friend.

questions.explanation: Duration with present perfect: for several months.
Asked if introduces an indirect yes/no question.
Comparative structure: more independent than before.
